_comment: School staff: edit this file to update the events calendar. Use ISO dates (YYYY-MM-DD). Keep events in chronological order.

events.title: School reopens — Monsoon term begins
events.details: All classes resume. Primary wing assembly at 8:00 AM.

events.title: Parent–Teacher Meeting (Classes VI–X)
events.details: 9:00 AM – 12:30 PM, respective classrooms. Slot bookings via class teachers.

events.title: Annual Production auditions
events.details: Amphitheatre, 3:00 PM onwards. Open to classes VIII–XII.

events.title: Inter-House Debate — Finals
events.details: Seminar Hall, 10:00 AM. Streamed live in the Virtual Classroom.

events.title: Independence Day celebrations
events.details: Flag hoisting 8:00 AM, cultural programme follows. Parents welcome.

events.title: Admissions 2026–27 close
events.details: Last date to submit online applications for all classes.
